mano_cua.result_summary: HTML head中存在两个重复的nuxt-google-fonts CSS link标签，第一个路径正确可加载，第二个路径包含绝对系统路径返回404。字体声明存在重复加载风险，模块在处理路径时产生了错误
mano_cua.last_reasoning: This is a clear application bug. nuxt-google-fonts module generates duplicate CSS links in the HTML head - the first one works correctly but the second uses an absolute system path that returns 404. This causes unnecessary network requests and potential font loading/overwrite issues.
